description: Maintain a registry of approved external workshops and service providers for fleet maintenance, including contact details, service specialisations, pricing, performance ratings, and contract status.

actors.name: Fleet Manager
actors.description: Registers and manages approved workshops; records performance ratings

actors.name: Procurement Manager
actors.description: Negotiates and records service agreements and pricing

actors.name: Technician
actors.description: Selects a workshop when logging a service event

actors.name: System
actors.description: Tracks contract expiry dates and triggers renewal reminders

values.name: active
values.description: Workshop is approved and available for service booking

values.name: contract_expiring
values.description: Service contract is within the renewal reminder window

values.name: suspended
values.description: Temporarily suspended from receiving new work (e.g., under review)

values.name: blacklisted
values.description: Permanently removed from the approved provider list

values.name: inactive
values.description: Workshop has closed or voluntarily removed from the list

transitions.description: Contract end date falls within the configured notice window
Contract renewed; new end date recorded
Workshop suspended pending review or performance investigation
Workshop closed or removed by request

unique_name.description: Workshop name must be unique in the directory

service_type_required.description: At least one service type must be specified for a workshop to be registered

active_only_for_service.description: Only workshops with Active status can be selected on maintenance log or service records

labour_rate_positive.description: Standard labour rate must be positive if provided

blacklist_permanent.description: A blacklisted workshop cannot be reactivated — a new record must be created if re-engagement is required

contract_dates_valid.description: Contract end date must be after contract start date when both are provided

rating_scale.description: Performance ratings are on a 1 to 5 scale; average_rating is computed from individual service ratings

given: at least one service_type is provided
workshop_registered.result: Workshop is added to the approved directory and available for service record selection

given: a service log entry references this workshop
a rating between 1 and 5 is submitted for the service

then.description: Recalculate running average from all ratings

workshop_rated.result: New rating is incorporated into the workshop's average performance score

then.description: Notify procurement manager of the suspension

workshop_suspended.result: Workshop is marked suspended; technicians cannot select it for new service records

given: days until contract_end_date is less than or equal to advance_notice_days

then.description: Notify procurement manager to renew the service agreement

contract_expired.result: Procurement manager is reminded to renew or terminate the workshop contract

workshop_blacklisted.result: Workshop is permanently removed from the approved list; any pending service records must be reassigned

errors.message: A workshop with this name already exists in the directory.
The selected workshop is not currently active. Please choose an approved service provider.
Performance rating must be between 1 and 5.

events.name: workshop.registered
events.description: A new service provider has been added to the approved workshop directory

events.name: workshop.service_rated
events.description: A performance rating has been recorded for a workshop service

events.name: workshop.suspended
events.description: A workshop has been temporarily suspended from receiving new work

events.name: workshop.contract_expiring
events.description: A workshop's service agreement is approaching its expiry date

events.name: workshop.blacklisted
events.description: A workshop has been permanently removed from the approved provider list

related.reason: Workshop records are referenced on each service log entry
Scheduled maintenance tasks can be pre-assigned to a preferred workshop

goals.description: Maintain a registry of approved external workshops and service providers for fleet maintenance, including contact details, service specialisations, pricing, performance ratings, and contract status.

success_metrics.measurement: Successful operations divided by total attempts

human_checkpoints: before transitioning to a terminal state

tradeoffs.reason: workflow steps must complete correctly before proceeding
